section_miscategorizations.text: She has had tubes tied after her last baby and denies any other pregnancies that were miscarriages or terminations. She also reports having experienced miscarriages and terminations.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The pregnancy history content is internally contradictory (denies miscarriages/terminations vs. reports miscarriages/terminations) and reads more like a past obstetric/gynecologic history than part of the current breast cancer-focused HPI. While still a history element, it would be better organized in a separate past medical/OB-GYN history section; however, its presence in HPI does not substantially mislead about the visit.
